label: PHAB LK Academy Ingest
info:
Inbound flow: LK Academy webhook -> immediate 200 OK -> POST /support/dialogs/events with connector=LK_ACADEMY_WEB_MESSENGER.

Incoming endpoint:
- POST /integrations/lk-academy/webhook

Node-RED env vars:
- SUPPORT_API_BASE_URL=http://<ph-ab-host>:3000/api
- SUPPORT_INTEGRATION_TOKEN=<optional>

name: Env vars
info:
Set in Node-RED settings/env:
SUPPORT_API_BASE_URL=http://localhost:3000/api
SUPPORT_INTEGRATION_TOKEN=<optional>

Public webhook path:
POST /integrations/lk-academy/webhook

name: reply 200
build support ingest
log support result
